title: helia pulchra
intro: Helia pulchra, also known as the false heliotrope or Heliotropium indicum, is a flowering plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helia pulchra include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Helia pulchra can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
